race.comment: The feature of the day is the 1.5 million Doomben 10000 to be run over 1200m at G1 level. GRAFTERBURNERS (12) is the new kid on the block, and he resumed with a top effort for third in the G2 Arrowfield at Randwick 5 weeks ago, and he has been deliberately kept on the fresh side for this. Zac Purton is here for this ride, and that is enough for us to put him on top. JIMMYSSTAR (1) is the best horse in the race on raw ability, but he'll be spotting the leaders a start coming to the turn. Can still win if the breaks fall his way in the straight. PRIVATE HARRY (7) is the enigma of the field, and he has not been at his best since joining the Chris Waller stable. He doesn't want the track to be too wet, but if he can find something like his best, then he can definitely take this out. ZARASTRO (9) each-way play at odds.
